text:
Examples: Assume that in a particular week, Monday, Wednesday and Thursday are business days 
and Tuesday is a non-business day. 
 
An investor submits an application on Monday to buy units of an equity mutual fund scheme for 
INR 3,00,000. If an application is made on Monday and the fund gets realized on Wednesday by 
2 pm, it will be Wednesday's NAV. If funds are realized or available for utilisation on Wednesday 
by 5 pm, then it will be Thursday's NAV. 

